title: Old Water
description: Reverts the water texture to the old, pre-1.13 texture. Vibrant/Bedrock-like variant available.
body:
Reverts the water texture to the old, pre-1.13 texture.

Vibrant/Bedrock-like variant available in the files/versions tab.

Also useful for overriding the water texture when using other resource packs that might make the water look worse.


**You might also want to use:**
